scripts.render:examples: npm run render:html -- examples/example.md dist/examples/example.html && npm run render:html -- examples/example.md dist/examples/example-print.html --style packages/html-renderer/styles/print.css && npm run render:html -- examples/editorial-sample.md dist/examples/editorial-sample.html && npm run render:html -- examples/editorial-sample.md dist/examples/editorial-sample-print.html --style packages/html-renderer/styles/print.css
scripts.render:examples:pdf: npm run render:pdf -- examples/example.md dist/examples/example.pdf && npm run render:pdf -- examples/editorial-sample.md dist/examples/editorial-sample.pdf --format Letter
scripts.test:
npm run build --silent && node dist/packages/importers/src/cli/importTxt.js packages/importers/fixtures/simple.txt > /tmp/oser-import-test.json && node dist/packages/importers/src/cli/importMarkdown.js packages/importers/fixtures/simple.md > /tmp/oser-import-markdown-test.json && node dist/packages/importers/src/cli/importMarkdown.js packages/importers/fixtures/frontmatter.md > /tmp/oser-import-frontmatter-test.json && node dist/packages/importers/src/cli/importMarkdown.js stress-tests/cases/oser-editorial-stress-sample.md > /tmp/oser-import-stress-frontmatter-test.json && node -e "const d = require('/tmp/oser-import-stress-frontmatter-test.json'); if (d.metadata.title !== 'OSER Editorial Stress Sample' || d.metadata.author !== 'OSER Test Fixture' || d.metadata.lang !== 'en' || d.metadata.language !== 'en') process.exit(1); const firstHeading = d.children.find((node) => node.type === 'heading'); const firstText = firstHeading && firstHeading.children && firstHeading.children[0] && firstHeading.children[0].value; if (firstText !== 'OSER Editorial Stress Sample') process.exit(1); const body = JSON.stringify(d.children); if (body.includes('title: \"OSER Editorial Stress Sample\"') || body.includes('author: \"OSER Test Fixture\"')) process.exit(1);" && node -e "const d = require('/tmp/oser-import-frontmatter-test.json'); if (d.metadata.title !== 'Frontmatter Fixture' || d.metadata.author !== 'OSER Test Fixture' || d.metadata.lang !== 'en' || d.metadata.language !== 'en') process.exit(1); const body = JSON.stringify(d.children); if (body.includes('title:') || body.includes('OSER Test Fixture')) process.exit(1);" && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.txt /tmp/oser-render-test.html > /tmp/oser-render-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.html > /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js packages/importers/fixtures/frontmatter.md /tmp/oser-render-frontmatter-test.html > /tmp/oser-render-frontmatter-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js stress-tests/cases/oser-editorial-stress-sample.md /tmp/oser-render-stress-frontmatter-test.html --profile examples/profiles/classic-book.json > /tmp/oser-render-stress-frontmatter-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md /tmp/oser-render-no-style-test.html --style none > /tmp/oser-render-no-style-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md /tmp/oser-render-print-test.html --style packages/html-renderer/styles/print.css > /tmp/oser-render-print-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md dist/examples/oser-render-profile-test.html --profile examples/profiles/classic-book.json > /tmp/oser-render-profile-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md dist/examples/oser-render-manifest-test.html --profile examples/profiles/classic-book.json --manifest dist/examples/oser-render-manifest-test.json > /tmp/oser-render-manifest-test.out && node -e "const { renderHtmlFromFile } = require('./dist/packages/html-renderer/src'); renderHtmlFromFile({ inputPath: 'examples/example.md', outputPath: '/tmp/oser-render-api-test.html', profilePath: 'examples/profiles/report.json', manifestPath: '/tmp/oser-render-api-test.manifest.json' }).then((result) => { if (!result.manifest || result.manifest.render.target !== 'html' || result.outputPath !== '/tmp/oser-render-api-test.html') process.exit(1); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });" && node dist/packages/diagnostics/src/cli/validate.js examples/example.md > /tmp/oser-validate-test.out && grep -q 'packages/html-renderer/styles/editorial.css' /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.html && ! grep -q 'rel="stylesheet"' /tmp/oser-render-no-style-test.html && grep -q 'packages/html-renderer/styles/print.css' /tmp/oser-render-print-test.html && grep -q 'packages/html-renderer/styles/editorial.css' dist/examples/oser-render-profile-test.html && grep -q '.tmp/layout-profiles/classic-book.css' dist/examples/oser-render-profile-test.html && grep -q 'Generated from OSER LayoutProfile: classic-book' dist/.tmp/layout-profiles/classic-book.css && grep -q '"schemaVersion": "1"' dist/examples/oser-render-manifest-test.json && grep -q '"target": "html"' dist/examples/oser-render-manifest-test.json && grep -q '"htmlPath": "dist/examples/oser-render-manifest-test.html"' dist/examples/oser-render-manifest-test.json && grep -q '' /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.html && grep -q 'Frontmatter Fixture' /tmp/oser-render-frontmatter-test.html && ! grep -q 'title:' /tmp/oser-render-frontmatter-test.html && ! grep -q 'OSER Test Fixture' /tmp/oser-render-frontmatter-test.html && ! grep -q 'title: "OSER Editorial Stress Sample"' /tmp/oser-render-stress-frontmatter-test.html && ! grep -q 'author: "OSER Test Fixture"' /tmp/oser-render-stress-frontmatter-test.html && grep -q '

OSER Editorial Stress Sample

' /tmp/oser-render-stress-frontmatter-test.html && grep -q 'Summary: 0 errors' /tmp/oser-validate-test.out
